headline: Coinbase (COIN) Valuation Check As Q1 Loss And AI Job Cuts Reshape The Business
summary: Coinbase Global (COIN) is back in focus after reporting first quarter 2026 results alongside a plan to cut 14% of its workforce, tying cost controls and an AI focused restructuring to weaker crypto trading conditions. See our latest analysis for Coinbase Global. The stock has been volatile, with a 10.15% 1 month share price return and 16.86% 3 month share price return, yet a year to date share price decline of 18.42% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 6.56%. Recent momentum...
